item.title: No joke: White House Correspondents Association taps mentalist as dinner headliner
item.description: The White House Correspondents' Association is once again ditching its tradition of having a comedian perform at its annual dinner and tapped mentalis...

item.title: DHS arrested 261 DACA 'Dreamers' last year; almost all had criminal records
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security arrested 261 people who were here under the Obama-era DACA deportation amnesty program and had deported 86 of them...

item.title: Petition seeks to rename Arkansas' Bill and HIllary Clinton airport over Epstein association
item.description: A Change.org petition is calling for removing the names of former President Bill Clinton and first lady Hillary Clinton from an airport in Little Rock...

item.title: Commerce Secretary Lutnick meets with Indian trade official after Supreme Court tariff ruling
item.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick met Thursday with India's trade minister, a sign the countries remain engaged after a Supreme Court ruling upended P...

item.title: Hillary Clinton is testifying as part of the House investigation into Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton is testifying before U.S. House lawmakers in New York on Thursday as part of a congressional investigation i...
